# Peritoneal Summit 2027

> The 2nd Peritoneal Summit is an interdisciplinary scientific meeting on the biology and medicine of the peritoneal cavity and other body cavities, held in Spiez, Switzerland, 8–10 September 2027. It brings together researchers across immunology, surgery, oncology, peritoneal dialysis, endometriosis, and bioengineering for talks, posters, and informal networking in a deliberately intimate format (~90 participants).

## Key facts
- Dates: 8–10 September 2027
- Venue: Hotel Seaside, Spiez, Switzerland
- Format: in-person, interdisciplinary, ~90 participants
- Registration opens: September 2026
- Abstract submission deadline: 15 June 2027
- Organizers: Joel Zindel (ETH Zürich), Inge K. Herrmann (ETH Zürich / Empa), Erin Greaves (University of Warwick), Sarah Herrick (University of Manchester)
- Website: https://peritoneal-summit.ch

## Pages
- [Home](https://peritoneal-summit.ch/index.html): Save-the-date overview of the Summit
- [Program](https://peritoneal-summit.ch/program.html): Provisional 3-day scientific program and session themes
- [Speakers](https://peritoneal-summit.ch/speakers.html): Organizing committee and confirmed speakers
- [Abstracts](https://peritoneal-summit.ch/abstracts.html): Abstract submission information (deadline 15 June 2027)
- [Registration](https://peritoneal-summit.ch/registration.html): Packages, key dates, and registration details
- [Venue](https://peritoneal-summit.ch/venue.html): Spiez venue and travel information
- [Contact](https://peritoneal-summit.ch/contact.html): Organizer contact

## Background
- The 1st Peritoneal Summit was held in Pontresina, Switzerland, 15–17 January 2025.
